github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Write a short title (max 72 chars) AND a detailed body when multiple changes exist.
Be precise about WHAT changed and WHY. Group related changes in bullet points.
✨ feat, 🐛 fix, 📝 docs, 🎨 style, ♻️ refactor, ⚡ perf, ✅ test, 🔧 chore, 🚀 build, 👷 ci, 🔒 security.
Format: <emoji> <type>(scope): <title>. Then optional body with bullet points.
